hero_subtitle: Experience the intersection of traditional heritage and modern gastronomy.
menu_subtitle: A meticulously curated selection of seasonal ingredients.
dish_1_desc: Fresh Italian burrata, heirloom tomatoes, basil oil, shaved black truffle.
dish_2_desc: Hand-cut wagyu, quail egg, capers, mustard seed caviar, sourdough crisp.
dish_3_desc: A fine-dining take on local flavors, served with a spiced berry coulis.
dish_4_desc: 45-day dry-aged beef, smoked garlic purée, wild asparagus, bone marrow jus.
dish_5_desc: Atlantic salmon, saffron risotto, fennel crisp, blood orange reduction.
dish_6_desc: Traditional cornmeal and cheese, elevated with porcini mushrooms and truffle oil.
dish_7_desc: Valrhona chocolate, liquid center, Madagascar vanilla bean gelato.
dish_8_desc: Silky cream, passionfruit glaze, edible gold leaf, pistachio crumble.
dish_9_desc: Selection of premium local and European cheeses, honeycomb, candied walnuts.
dish_10_desc: Deep, complex red wine with notes of dark cherry and subtle oak. Bottle.
dish_11_desc: Crisp, elegant white wine with floral aromas and a hint of citrus. Bottle.
dish_12_desc: Premium gin, elderflower liqueur, fresh blackberry, rosemary smoke.
about_text_1: Lumina was born from a desire to elevate dining into an unforgettable sensory journey. Nestled in the heart of the city, we source only the finest ingredients from local artisans and international purveyors.
about_text_2: Every plate we serve is a canvas, and every flavor is a brushstroke. We believe that true luxury lies in attention to detail—from the ambient lighting to the exact temperature of your wine.
about_chef_text: With over two decades shaping the menus of Michelin-starred establishments across Europe, our Executive Chef brings a philosophy of 'elegant simplicity' back to their roots.
contact_subtitle: For private events, reservations, or general inquiries, our concierge is at your service.
